en_definition: to transfer data from internet to computer
example1: I need to download the file from the website.
example1_ru: Мне нужно скачать файл с сайта.
example2: Students can download lecture notes from the portal.

en_definition: to transfer data from computer to internet
example1: Please upload your assignment before midnight.
example1_ru: Пожалуйста, загрузите своё задание до полуночи.
example2: The professor will upload the exam results tomorrow.

en_definition: a piece of equipment designed for specific purpose
example1: Most students use a mobile device for studying.
example1_ru: Большинство студентов используют для учёбы мобильное устройство.
example2: This device measures temperature in the laboratory.

en_definition: secret code to access account or system
example1: Keep your password safe and do not share it.
example1_ru: Храните свой пароль в тайне и никому его не сообщайте.
example2: The university password must contain eight characters.

en_definition: programs and applications on computer
example1: The software updates automatically every week.
example1_ru: Программа обновляется автоматически каждую неделю.
example2: We use specialized software for data analysis.

en_definition: physical parts and components of computer
example1: The lab has expensive hardware for research.
example1_ru: В лаборатории есть дорогое оборудование для исследований.
example2: We need to upgrade our computer hardware.

en_definition: connected computers sharing information
example1: The university network is very fast and reliable.
example1_ru: Университетская сеть очень быстрая и надёжная.
example2: The research team built a wireless network.

en_definition: system or device for communicating with computer
example1: The user interface is easy and intuitive.
example1_ru: Пользовательский интерфейс простой и интуитивно понятный.
example2: The mobile interface was redesigned last month.

en_definition: powerful computer providing services to others
example1: The server stores all university student records.
example1_ru: На сервере хранятся все записи студентов университета.
example2: The web server was down for maintenance today.

en_definition: software for viewing websites on internet
example1: Chrome is the most popular browser worldwide.
example1_ru: Chrome — самый популярный браузер в мире.
example2: The browser crashed while I was researching.

en_definition: small symbol showing position on computer screen
example1: Move the cursor to select the text.
example1_ru: Переместите курсор, чтобы выделить текст.
example2: The cursor turned into a loading circle.

en_definition: device with buttons for typing on computer
example1: An ergonomic keyboard reduces wrist pain.
example1_ru: Эргономичная клавиатура снижает боль в запястье.
example2: The laptop keyboard is smaller than normal.

en_definition: screen that displays information from computer
example1: A large monitor is better for extended work.
example1_ru: Большой монитор лучше подходит для долгой работы.
example2: The laboratory has multiple monitors per workstation.

en_definition: to press button on computer mouse quickly
example1: Click the button to submit your form.
example1_ru: Нажмите на кнопку, чтобы отправить форму.
example2: Double-click the icon to open the file.

en_definition: to move text or images up and down screen
example1: Scroll down to see more search results.
example1_ru: Прокрутите вниз, чтобы увидеть больше результатов поиска.
example2: You need to scroll to the bottom of page.

en_definition: collection of pages accessible on internet
example1: The university website has all course information.
example1_ru: На сайте университета есть вся информация о курсах.
example2: I found the news on the official website.

en_definition: a file that is sent together with an email message
example1: Please open the attachment to see the full report.
example1_ru: Пожалуйста, откройте вложение, чтобы увидеть полный отчёт.
example2: I forgot to add the attachment before sending the email.

en_definition: information or facts stored in computer
example1: The research team collected important data.
example1_ru: Исследовательская группа собрала важные данные.
example2: Data privacy is very important for companies.

en_definition: document or collection of information stored
example1: Save the file to your desktop for later.
example1_ru: Сохраните файл на рабочий стол на будущее.
example2: The file is too large to send by email.

en_definition: global system of connected computer networks
example1: The internet has changed how we communicate.
example1_ru: Интернет изменил то, как мы общаемся.
example2: Students need internet access for assignments.

en_definition: wireless technology for internet connection
example1: The wifi password is posted in the library.
example1_ru: Пароль от вайфая указан на доске в библиотеке.
example2: The coffee shop has free wifi for customers.

en_definition: organized collection of information stored
example1: The university maintains a large student database.
example1_ru: Университет ведёт большую базу данных студентов.
example2: Scientists query the gene database for research.

en_definition: to look for information online or elsewhere
example1: Search the web for information about topic.
example1_ru: Поищите в интернете информацию по этой теме.
example2: I searched for the article in the database.

en_definition: connection to another page or website
example1: Click the link to access the full article.
example1_ru: Нажмите на ссылку, чтобы открыть полную статью.
example2: The external link may not work anymore.

en_definition: channels for communicating information to public
example1: Social media connects people worldwide instantly.
example1_ru: Социальные сети мгновенно связывают людей по всему миру.
example2: The news media reported on the discovery.

en_definition: recording of moving images with sound
example1: Watch the tutorial video before starting work.
example1_ru: Посмотрите обучающее видео перед тем, как приступить к работе.
example2: The professor posted a lecture video online.

en_definition: series of audio or video programs online
example1: I listen to science podcasts during commute.
example1_ru: Я слушаю научные подкасты по дороге на работу.
example2: The university produces several educational podcasts.

en_definition: transmission of radio or television program
example1: The live broadcast reached millions of viewers.
example1_ru: Прямую трансляцию посмотрели миллионы зрителей.
example2: The sports broadcast started at eight o'clock.

en_definition: station or website providing entertainment
example1: Change the channel to watch news program.
example1_ru: Переключи канал, чтобы посмотреть новости.
example2: YouTube is a popular video channel platform.

en_definition: piece of writing in newspaper or magazine
example1: I read an interesting article about climate.
example1_ru: Я прочитал интересную статью о климате.
example2: The scientific article was published recently.

en_definition: information about recent events and happenings
example1: Have you heard the news about new discovery.
example1_ru: Ты слышал новость о новом открытии?
example2: The news reported about the weather change.

en_definition: main title at top of newspaper or article
example1: The headline caught my attention immediately.
example1_ru: Заголовок сразу привлёк моё внимание.
example2: Breaking news headlines appear on screen.

en_definition: publication with articles and pictures monthly
example1: I subscribe to several science magazines.
example1_ru: Я подписан на несколько научных журналов.
example2: The magazine has interesting articles inside.

en_definition: person who gathers and reports news
example1: The journalist interviewed the scientist.
example1_ru: Журналист взял интервью у учёного.
example2: Journalists cover events for newspapers.

en_definition: film presenting facts and real information
example1: That documentary about space was amazing.
example1_ru: Тот документальный фильм о космосе был потрясающим.
example2: The nature documentary shows wildlife behavior.

en_definition: a person who is trying to be chosen for a job or position
example1: Only three candidates were invited for the second interview.
example1_ru: На второе собеседование пригласили только трёх кандидатов.
example2: The company selected a candidate with strong technical skills.

en_definition: written or spoken account of information
example1: Submit your lab report by Friday afternoon.
example1_ru: Сдайте отчёт по лабораторной работе к пятнице после обеда.
example2: The research report included all findings.

en_definition: number calculated by adding sum divided by
example1: The average temperature is about twenty degrees.
example1_ru: Средняя температура — около двадцати градусов.
example2: Students need an average of seventy percent.

en_definition: complete amount when everything is added
example1: The total cost is much higher than expected.
example1_ru: Общая стоимость намного выше, чем ожидалось.
example2: Calculate the total of all the numbers.

en_definition: portion or share out of one hundred
example1: Eighty percent of students passed exam.
example1_ru: Восемьдесят процентов студентов сдали экзамен.
example2: The percentage increase was significant.

en_definition: an amount of food served to one person at a meal
example1: He asked for a second helping of rice and vegetables.
example1_ru: Он попросил вторую порцию риса с овощами.
example2: Her mother always gives her a generous helping of soup.

en_definition: total quantity or sum of something
example1: A small amount of salt improves taste.
example1_ru: Небольшое количество соли улучшает вкус.
example2: The amount of work is increasing daily.

en_definition: group or set of twelve items
example1: She bought a dozen eggs from market.
example1_ru: Она купила на рынке дюжину яиц.
example2: A dozen students attended the seminar.

en_definition: one of four equal parts of whole
example1: A quarter of the class was absent yesterday.
example1_ru: Вчера четверть класса отсутствовала.
example2: The meeting lasts a quarter hour.

en_definition: one of two equal parts of something
example1: Half the students chose science major.
example1_ru: Половина студентов выбрала естественнонаучную специальность.
example2: Add a half cup of sugar to recipe.

en_definition: to make something three times larger
example1: The population tripled in ten years.
example1_ru: За десять лет население утроилось.
example2: We need to triple the recipe for group.

en_definition: to make something two times as large
example1: The company doubled its profits last year.
example1_ru: В прошлом году компания удвоила прибыль.
example2: Double the ingredients for bigger batch.

en_definition: to increase amount by repeated addition
example1: Multiply ten by five to get fifty.
example1_ru: Умножь десять на пять, получится пятьдесят.
example2: The number multiplied rapidly over time.

en_definition: to separate into smaller equal parts
example1: Divide the cake into eight pieces equally.
example1_ru: Раздели торт на восемь равных кусков.
example2: The tasks are divided among team members.

en_definition: period of one hundred years in time
example1: The twentieth century had major changes.
example1_ru: В двадцатом веке произошли большие перемены.
example2: This tradition dates back centuries.

en_definition: period of exactly ten consecutive years
example1: That was popular in the nineteen seventies.
example1_ru: Это было популярно в семидесятых годах.
example2: Technology changed over the last decade.

en_definition: long period of time characterized by events
example1: We live in the digital age era.
example1_ru: Мы живём в эпоху цифровых технологий.
example2: The Victorian era lasted many years.

en_definition: significant period or point in history
example1: This marks a new epoch in science.
example1_ru: Это знаменует новую эпоху в науке.
example2: The Renaissance was an important epoch.

en_definition: very short period of time at present
example1: Wait a moment, I will answer you.
example1_ru: Подожди немного, я тебе отвечу.
example2: That moment changed everything forever.

en_definition: extremely short moment or point in time
example1: It happened in an instant without warning.
example1_ru: Это произошло мгновенно, без предупреждения.
example2: The response was instant and immediate.

en_definition: in time near to present or current
example1: I finished the project recently.
example1_ru: Недавно я закончил этот проект.
example2: Recently, the university opened new building.

en_definition: without delay or at once instantly
example1: Call the doctor immediately if needed.
example1_ru: При необходимости немедленно вызовите врача.
example2: The results appeared immediately after test.

en_definition: finally or in the end after time
example1: She studied hard and eventually passed.
example1_ru: Она усердно училась и в итоге сдала экзамен.
example2: Eventually, the problem was solved.

en_definition: at same time as something else
example1: Meanwhile, the other team prepared.
example1_ru: Тем временем другая команда готовилась.
example2: He left. Meanwhile, she called home.

en_definition: at time before now in past
example1: I had seen this film previously before.
example1_ru: Я уже видел этот фильм раньше.
example2: Previously, the rules were different.

en_definition: at exactly the same time together
example1: Both events happened simultaneously yesterday.
example1_ru: Вчера оба события произошли одновременно.
example2: The experiments ran simultaneously.

en_definition: relating to time or duration
example1: The temporal sequence was not clear.
example1_ru: Временная последовательность была неясной.
example2: We discussed the temporal aspects.

en_definition: done quickly without unnecessary delay
example1: The prompt response helped solve issue.
example1_ru: Быстрый отклик помог решить проблему.
example2: We need a prompt decision today.

en_definition: before a particular time or before something else happens
example1: Please let us know beforehand if you cannot attend the meeting.
example1_ru: Пожалуйста, предупредите нас заранее, если не сможете прийти на встречу.
example2: We booked the tickets beforehand to avoid the long queue.

en_definition: length of time something continues
example1: The event has a duration of hours.
example1_ru: Мероприятие длится несколько часов.
example2: The course duration is one semester.

en_definition: space of time between two events
example1: Tests are given at regular intervals.
example1_ru: Тесты проводятся через регулярные промежутки времени.
example2: There is an hour interval between classes.

en_definition: a list of things to be discussed or done at a meeting
example1: The manager sent the agenda before the Monday meeting started.
example1_ru: Менеджер разослал повестку дня перед началом встречи в понедельник.
example2: We covered every item on the agenda within an hour.

en_definition: the day by which something must be finished or paid
example1: The due date for the essay is next Friday afternoon.
example1_ru: Крайний срок сдачи сочинения — следующая пятница после обеда.
example2: She paid her bill before the due date to avoid a fine.

en_definition: date exactly one year after event
example1: We celebrated the university anniversary.
example1_ru: Мы отметили годовщину университета.
example2: The company marked its anniversary.

en_definition: sequence of events arranged in time
example1: The timeline shows project milestones.
example1_ru: На временной шкале показаны этапы проекта.
example2: Create a timeline for research.

en_definition: to cause things to happen at same time
example1: Synchronize your devices before uploading.
example1_ru: Синхронизируйте свои устройства перед загрузкой.
example2: We need to synchronize our schedules.

en_definition: temporary storage of computer data
example1: Clear the browser cache for speed.
example1_ru: Очистите кэш браузера для повышения скорости.
example2: The cache improves loading performance.

en_definition: copy of data stored for safety
example1: Make a backup of important files.
example1_ru: Сделайте резервную копию важных файлов.
example2: Cloud backup protects your documents.

en_definition: particular arrangement or style of something
example1: Save the file in PDF format please.
example1_ru: Пожалуйста, сохраните файл в формате PDF.
example2: The format of the report changed.

en_definition: to make current or add latest information
example1: Update your software to latest version.
example1_ru: Обновите программу до последней версии.
example2: The website updates daily with news.

en_definition: to set up equipment for use
example1: Install the printer on your computer.
example1_ru: Установите принтер на свой компьютер.
example2: Please install the required software.

en_definition: to remove or erase something
example1: Delete the old files to save space.
example1_ru: Удалите старые файлы, чтобы освободить место.
example2: I accidentally deleted the document.

en_definition: to bring something back to former state
example1: Restore the deleted file from backup.
example1_ru: Восстановите удалённый файл из резервной копии.
example2: The system was restored to normal.

en_definition: to reduce size of file for storage
example1: Compress the images before sending.
example1_ru: Сожмите изображения перед отправкой.
example2: The file was compressed to ZIP.

en_definition: to remove or take out something
example1: Extract the files from the archive.
example1_ru: Извлеките файлы из архива.
example2: Scientists extract data from results.

en_definition: unwanted email or messages in bulk
example1: Delete spam emails from inbox.
example1_ru: Удалите спам из папки входящих.
example2: My inbox is full of spam.

en_definition: harmful program damaging computer
example1: A virus infected the university system.
example1_ru: Вирус заразил систему университета.
example2: Install antivirus protection immediately.

en_definition: software that protects a computer network from unauthorized access
example1: The company installed a firewall to block harmful traffic.
example1_ru: Компания установила файрвол, чтобы блокировать вредоносный трафик.
example2: Our firewall stopped several suspicious login attempts last night.

en_definition: an online service where users can find and download software applications
example1: You can download the game for free from the app store.
example1_ru: Ты можешь бесплатно скачать эту игру из магазина приложений.
example2: The app store shows reviews before you install anything.

en_definition: computer program designed for task
example1: Download the application from store.
example1_ru: Скачайте приложение из магазина.
example2: This application simplifies data analysis.

en_definition: small program adding features to software
example1: Install the plugin for more features.
example1_ru: Установите плагин, чтобы получить больше возможностей.
example2: The browser plugin blocks ads.

en_definition: list of options or commands available
example1: Click on the File menu at top.
example1_ru: Нажмите на меню «Файл» вверху.
example2: The menu shows all available options.

en_definition: small picture representing program or file
example1: Click the desktop icon to open.
example1_ru: Нажмите на значок на рабочем столе, чтобы открыть его.
example2: The icon is missing from screen.

en_definition: row of buttons and tools in software
example1: The toolbar has useful formatting buttons.
example1_ru: На панели инструментов есть полезные кнопки форматирования.
example2: Customize the toolbar for efficiency.

en_definition: continuous flow of media online
example1: Streaming services offer films and shows.
example1_ru: Стриминговые сервисы предлагают фильмы и сериалы.
example2: The video streaming is very smooth.

en_definition: collection of songs arranged together
example1: Create a playlist for studying.
example1_ru: Создай плейлист для учёбы.
example2: The playlist has fifty songs.

en_definition: to enter a username and password to access an account or system
example1: You need to log in before you can view your messages.
example1_ru: Тебе нужно войти в систему, прежде чем ты сможешь посмотреть свои сообщения.
example2: I could not log in because I forgot my password.

en_definition: maximum data rate of connection
example1: Our bandwidth is very limited today.
example1_ru: Сегодня у нас очень ограниченная пропускная способность сети.
example2: Increase bandwidth for faster speeds.

en_definition: smallest dot of color on screen
example1: The image has high pixel density.
example1_ru: У этого изображения высокая плотность пикселей.
example2: Pixels combine to form picture.

en_definition: clarity or sharpness of image
example1: The high resolution looks very clear.
example1_ru: Высокое разрешение выглядит очень чётко.
example2: Increase resolution for better quality.

en_definition: step-by-step procedure for solving problem
example1: The algorithm improves search results.
example1_ru: Алгоритм улучшает результаты поиска.
example2: Computer programs use algorithms.

en_definition: instructions written for computer
example1: The programmer wrote the code.
example1_ru: Программист написал код.
example2: The code contains several errors.

en_definition: to find and fix errors in program
example1: Debug the software before release.
example1_ru: Отладьте программу перед выпуском.
example2: The team debugged all issues.

en_definition: conversation chain in online forum
example1: Read the forum thread carefully.
example1_ru: Внимательно прочитайте тему на форуме.
example2: Start a new thread for topic.

en_definition: symbol followed by word for social media
example1: Use hashtag to find related posts.
example1_ru: Используйте хэштег, чтобы найти похожие посты.
example2: The hashtag trended on twitter.
